form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently won by 2 len at this track April 5 over 1400m defeating Layetezelzel carrying 52.5kg at $8.35. The run before that 3rd of 15 at Osmangazi All Weather on March 23 over 1800m, 4 len behind Gemlik In Kizi with 55kg at $6.55. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up second last of 9 at this track on March 26 over 1900m, 21 len behind Ruzgar Akarca with 55.5kg at $7.10. form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 10 at this track on April 9 over 1900m, 9 len behind Le Roi Danse carrying 56kg at $13.75. form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at this track February 1 over 1400m, 27 len behind Duyarli carrying 55kg at $13.70. form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up made ground from midfield; 2nd of 11 at this track on March 20 over 1600m, 4 len behind Boundless Power carrying 58kg at $13.65.
